message:
The other day, I found myself outside with my dog, Max, just throwing a stick around in the backyard. I realized how long it had been since I’d just let loose and enjoyed some simple, low-tech fun. No screens, no distractions—just me, Max, and the great outdoors. It's funny how we sometimes forget the joy in the little things!

While we were playing, I thought about how much I cherish these moments, especially when it comes to being prepared for whatever life throws our way. Sometimes, just getting outside and enjoying nature can remind us of what’s truly important.

Have you had any low-tech fun recently? What’s your favorite way to unplug?
